channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 40 Lordship Lane Flytipping, 3rd April
item.description:
A washing machine is on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lordship Lane outside Marks and Spencer-Flytipping, 3rd April
item.description:
A flytipped trolley is outside Marks and Spencer. It is a trolley that does not belong to the store.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not fully working, 3rd April
item.description:
Missing leds
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Elm Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped box, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, Someone has fly tipped a box of building materials at the end of Eastney street, please could these be cleared? Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastney Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip at the end of Eastney street, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, Someone has fly tipped some building materials at the end of Eastney street, please could these be cleared? Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three bins constantly on pavement causing fly tipping & mess daily, 3rd April
item.description:
Myself & other residents were told these bins were to be removed from the pavement months ago as they are here without permission. They cause fly tipping & general rubbish dumping daily . Foxes rip bags and food nappies & other debris is often strewn across the pavement and road causing obstruction and foul odours . Every time I note this you clear away the rubbish and the root of the issue remains to create ongoing dumping ! You close the account as sorted but it isn't . Please do as you said months ago and tell the pizza restaurant owner there bins are not to be there 24/7 . It would be bad enough if they put them out on the collection day but they've been permanently there for months despite numerous complaints. Please help !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing communal bin with broken bottom, 3rd April
item.description:
Hello, there’s a big communal general waste bin that’s overflowing with a hole in the bottom, been left in the middle of the road at the entrance to Park Close. It’s come from the bin shed of Regency Court I believe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 13, 3rd April
item.description:
Children's tricycle Thank you for removing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Outside number 11 and also 13, 3rd April
item.description:
A lot of litter outside houses 11 and 13 and also in the road Sorry no time to take photos Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Behind the bus stop, 3rd April
item.description:
There is a lot of litter and bottles behind this bus stop on both right and left side behind Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London

item.title: Flytipping by Harleston Close, 3rd April

Fly tipping at the corner of Harleston Close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harleston Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Estate agents advertising boards remain on railings long after sale has completed, 3rd April
item.description:
A number of estate agent advertising boards remain attached to the railings of the car park area long after sales and lets have been completed -beyond 14 days. False and free advertising? One board has fallen down and littering the area. Is this acceptable behaviour?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lime Tree terrace, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley left between no 76 and 78, 3rd April
item.description:
Trolley left in gap between no 76 and no 78 since before Easter weekend. The gap often has rubbish/stuff fly tipped and could increase if people see that there is rubbish left there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Straightsmouth, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In Eastbound cycle lane at junction of Tottenham Court Road and Torrington Place, 3rd April
item.description:
Some barriers have collapsed into the cycle lane. They are difficult for cyclists to see if they turning left from TCR into Torrington Place going East. Could cause a cycle accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Torrington Place, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside alleyway/1 Powerscroft Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Continued fly tipping by residents & business of lower Clapton road with alleyway access to Powerscroft road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes/hokes in surfaces, 3rd April
item.description:
The safety surfacing is in a poor state of repair as is the wooden surface on the bridge by the zip wire. Some of the play equipment is also in disrepair which is unsafe for most children but specifically for sight impaired children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light outside Kossoff’s bakery, 3rd April
item.description:
The traffic light crossing button outside kossoffs bakery on Kentish town road does not function, this forces pedestrians to have to cross whilst traffic is going as the light will not change to red.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 309-311, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
